model_specification_line: model = smf.wls("full_time_employed ~ daca_eligible + daca_eligible:post_daca + C(age_in_2012) + C(year) + C(statefip) + C(sex) + C(marst) + UNEMP + LFPR + DRIVERSLICENSES + EVERIFY + SECURECOMMUNITIES", data=df, weights=df["perwt"]).fit(cov_type="cluster", cov_kwds={"groups": df["statefip"]})
